title: Ripped subs fan translation available
wikitext:
[]: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Mar 09, 2021 1:34 pm EGF Discord user sackboy97 has valiantly helmed the effort to translate the subs extracted from the app, and the fruits of his work are now here! Our very own pwhodges proofread them for spelling and grammar, with contributions from Derantor and myself for the German words; sackboy97 wants to add that the translation is on the rougher end of things, but considering the time frame, that should hardly be a surprise. Nonetheless, the results are nothing to be scoffed at. Feast your eyes upon the results of sackboy97's two days of tireless work!

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by Tajai » Tue Mar 09, 2021 1:52 pm Blockio wrote: EGF Discord user sackboy97 has valiantly helmed the effort to translate the subs extracted from the app, and the fruits of his work are now here! Our very own pwhodges proofread them for spelling and grammar, with contributions from Derantor and myself for the German words; sackboy97 wants to add that the translation is on the rougher end of things, but considering the time frame, that should hardly be a surprise. Nonetheless, the results are nothing to be scoffed at. Feast your eyes upon the results of sackboy97's two days of tireless work!

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Tue Mar 09, 2021 1:57 pm I'll add my own thanks to sackboy97 here-truly a good job! There's lots of interesting stuff here-Misato's father caused Second Impact, Kensuke's and Asuka's relationship doesn't appear to have romantic connotations according to the script (though of course the visuals might change everything), Gendo's reasons seem kind of similar to those of Seele's in NGE, also Gendo really gets similarities to NGE!Shinji here. It also seems that when Mari meets Shinji on the Wunder, she asks him who she is and gives "large breasts" as a hint, Shinji doesn't say that then. Besides from that, my thoughts are a bit scrambled and the last few things there seem impossible to understand without seeing the film.

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Tue Mar 09, 2021 2:05 pm First of all, thank you very much to sackboy97! Even reading this translation and some things have become clear, it's still impossible to fully understand, I need to watch the film.

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by Jayfive » Tue Mar 09, 2021 2:10 pm More readable version via Reichu's spoilerific twitter account: https://t.co/W2bcGOgRds?amp=1

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Mar 09, 2021 2:17 pm So, all that's needed is to re-attach the original timing info, and there's a subtitle file ready to go.

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Tue Mar 09, 2021 2:17 pm Jayfive wrote: More readable version via Reichu's spoilerific twitter account: https://t.co/W2bcGOgRds?amp=1

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Mar 09, 2021 2:25 pm Jayfive wrote: More readable version via Reichu's spoilerific twitter account: https://t.co/W2bcGOgRds?amp=1

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by ShikinamiBogard » Tue Mar 09, 2021 2:56 pm i had no words to describe this hapiness, thank you so much !!

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by Jayfive » Tue Mar 09, 2021 3:01 pm OK but how do you get rid of this sort the "\tab\tab.....\par" stuff in that the first file short of manually replacing in Word?

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by sackboy97 » Tue Mar 09, 2021 3:08 pm Jayfive wrote: OK but how do you get rid of this sort the "\tab\tab.....\par" stuff in that the first file short of manually replacing in Word?

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by Jayfive » Tue Mar 09, 2021 3:29 pm Yeah that worked, thanks Guv'nor

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by Pluto » Tue Mar 09, 2021 5:05 pm Wow thanks! EDIT I'm just reading it now. The organization is called Kredit not Claudette. They have their own logo like Wille or Nerv and they show boxes and the organizations doings in the movie.

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Mar 09, 2021 5:37 pm Huh. I thought the Kredit/Claudette mix up in the file was already resolved.

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Mar 11, 2021 7:17 am I now have the ripped images in my hands, and it's a glorious feeling to be able to read them with the full context of having seen the film for reference. If there are any lines in particular you're wondering about, let me know and I'll give them a re-translation. I'd love to do the whole thing, but I have no idea if I have that kind of time! But small things here and there? I'd be interested.

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by Konja7 » Thu Mar 11, 2021 10:19 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: I now have the ripped images in my hands, and it's a glorious feeling to be able to read them with the full context of having seen the film for reference. If there are any lines in particular you're wondering about, let me know and I'll give them a re-translation. I'd love to do the whole thing, but I have no idea if I have that kind of time! But small things here and there? I'd be interested.

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by sackboy97 » Fri Mar 12, 2021 8:39 am Konja7 wrote: Nuclear Lunchbox#914577 wrote: I now have the ripped images in my hands, and it's a glorious feeling to be able to read them with the full context of having seen the film for reference. If there are any lines in particular you're wondering about, let me know and I'll give them a re-translation. I'd love to do the whole thing, but I have no idea if I have that kind of time! But small things here and there? I'd be interested.

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by Konja7 » Fri Mar 12, 2021 8:55 am sackboy97 wrote: This was probably a mistake on my part, as I was working without having even read a summary. I think it's Kaworu, apologising to Shinji, and then Kaji commenting on it.

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by Slowpokeking » Fri Mar 12, 2021 10:56 pm Thanks so much!

[]: Re: Ripped subs fan translation available!             Quote Post by kuro hazama » Sat Mar 13, 2021 8:40 am Im pretty sure Kaji´s line to kaworu: "Ill leave you to It", should be "lets leave It at that" (more accurate) If one wants to really abbreviate "not yet" People are reposting this file calling It "real accurate translation" but Its pretty much a WIP.

Our very own pwhodges proofread them for spelling and grammar, with contributions from Derantor and myself for the German words; sackboy97 wants to add that the translation is on the rougher end
